executions.sql:
SELECT
    teig_eiendom_id,
    kommunenummer,
    teigareal,
    ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(geometri, 4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM
    matrikkel.matrikkeleneiendomskartteig
WHERE
    kommunenummer = '3005'  -- Drammen municipality
    AND teigareal > 5000
    AND teig_eiendom_id IS NOT NULL;
